boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot allow: hazard-control status is pending, not confirmed
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P requires exact hazard-control status match before PO execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending controls block closure per STD-AST-081-P
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: REL-AST-081 release exists but cabinet/handler controls remain pending; dependency unresolved

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed. REL-AST-081 confirms the execution release exists but explicitly states active cabinet/handler controls remain pending. STD-AST-081-P mandates an exact match on hazard-control status before PO execution. This pending-status dependency creates an unresolved abstract-field trap. The generic warning in WARN-AST-081 cannot substitute for confirmed hazard-control closure. Escalation is required to resolve the pending-controls defect before boundary closure is possible.
open_blockers: Active cabinet/handler controls remain pending per REL-AST-081
047-style abstract-field trap: hazard-control status not confirmed closed
